name: ArcticTrolley
shortDescription: Elegant white cosmetic equipment trolley with sturdy metal frame. Open shelf system, four casters, compact size (76×40.5×49 cm).
description:
The ArcticTrolley is an elegant white cosmetic equipment trolley designed specifically for the needs of beauty salons, SPAs, and aesthetic treatment rooms.

Its sturdy metal frame easily supports cosmetic devices, applicators, and accessories. The open shelves are perfectly suited for organized placement of tools and cosmetics.

Despite its compact dimensions (76×40.5×49 cm), it offers spacious storage while fitting in small spaces. Thanks to the four durable wheels, it can be easily moved anywhere.
metaDescription: ArcticTrolley white cosmetic equipment trolley with sturdy metal frame. Open shelf system, 4 casters, compact size. Professional salon furniture.

final.headline: Interested in the ArcticTrolley?
final.subtitle: Request a free consultation, or order directly!

featureRows.headline: Why the ArcticTrolley?
featureRows.subtitle: Stable, practical, and elegant cosmetic equipment trolley

features.title: Sturdy metal frame
features.description: The ArcticTrolley's strong metal frame stably holds cosmetic devices, applicators, and accessories. It doesn't wobble or creak – it provides a solid foundation for professional work.

features.title: Compact and practical design
features.description: Its 76 cm height provides a comfortable working height, while its 40.5 cm width allows it to fit in small spaces. The open shelf system provides clear, quick access.

faq.question: Does it need assembly?
faq.answer: Yes, minimal assembly is required: mount the shelves on the frame and attach the casters. Assembly can be completed in a few minutes.

faq.question: Is it suitable for storing devices?
faq.answer: Yes, the sturdy metal frame is suitable for safely placing cosmetic devices, applicators, and accessories.

faq.question: How can it be cleaned?
faq.answer: The smooth surfaces can be easily wiped down with a damp cloth or surface disinfectant, ensuring a hygienic work environment at all times.
